name: discord-range-cursor
title: Discord range backfill: two-cursor window + prune out-of-range msgs/digests + persisted range picker + digest scroll
description: Replace single start-date with a [start,end] range (two cursors). Prune messages+digests outside range on change. Range picker defaults to saved/persisted position (survives re-login). Make expanded digest scrollable.
creator: gitsync
